originalTitle: Mugabe's son drops bail request - what has happened to the family after losing power
title: Mugabe's son drops bail request - what has happened to the family after losing power
content: Bellarmine Mugabe will negotiate a plea deal after being accused of attempted murder and other charges in South Africa.

originalTitle: French aid worker among three killed in drone strikes in rebel-held DR Congo city
title: French aid worker among three killed in drone strikes in rebel-held DR Congo city
content: Witnesses say drone strikes hit a residential building frequently occupied by expatriates and aid workers in Goma.

originalTitle: Floods and landslides kill 30 in southern Ethiopia
title: Floods and landslides kill 30 in southern Ethiopia
content: Forecasters say storms are becoming more intense in the region, partly due to global warming.

originalTitle: Six die in Swiss bus fire after man thought to have set himself alight
title: Six die in Swiss bus fire after man thought to have set himself alight
content: Fribourg canton's public prosecutor Raphael Bourquin said the man allegedly responsible for the fire likely died.

originalTitle: The hidden battlefield: Censorship in the Israel–Iran war
title: The hidden battlefield: Censorship in the Israel–Iran war
content: Missiles fly between Israel and Iran, but censorship and access limits mean much of the war remains hidden from view.

originalTitle: Ship crew film drone strike on oil facility at Oman’s Salalah port
title: Ship crew film drone strike on oil facility at Oman’s Salalah port
content: Crew on-board a nearby vessel at Oman’s Salalah port filmed the moment a drone struck the oil facility.

originalTitle: Bowen: Trump has called for an Iran uprising but the lessons from Iraq in 1991 loom large
title: Bowen: Trump has called for an Iran uprising but the lessons from Iraq in 1991 loom large
content: The US president might learn that starting wars is much easier than ending them, writes the BBC's international editor.

originalTitle: Countries agree to record release of emergency oil reserves as prices surge
title: Countries agree to record release of emergency oil reserves as prices surge
content: The G7 group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

originalTitle: 'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with war
title: 'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with war
content: Iranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues.

originalTitle: 'Wrong person at wrong time' - but if not Tudor then who?
title: 'Wrong person at wrong time' - but if not Tudor then who?
content: Following Tottenham's 5-2 defeat at Atletico Madrid in the Champions League, BBC Sport assesses the options open to the beleaguered club.

originalTitle: 'Doomsday scenario' for Spurs after 'blows' - Van de Ven
title: 'Doomsday scenario' for Spurs after 'blows' - Van de Ven
content: Micky Van de Ven says Tottenham found themselves in a "doomsday scenario" against Atletico Madrid, adding the club is "just taking blow after blow".

originalTitle: Iranian minister says country will not play in World Cup
title: Iranian minister says country will not play in World Cup
content: Iran is not in a position to participate in the 2026 World Cup, says the country's Minister of Sports and Youth.
